strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise, including building microservices handling millions of requests per second and event-driven architectures.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and frameworks supporting agentic workflows.
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD, with baseline fintech exposure from time at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severe lack of executive leadership experience; background is entirely in Individual Contributor (Senior/Staff) roles rather than scaling teams to 30+ engineers.
AI experience is limited to a brief 6-month stint, falling short of the deep, production-level multi-agent architectural expertise required.
No demonstrated experience managing external delivery partners, reporting to a board, or building regulatory compliance infrastructure.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems expertise and a solid foundation in software craftsmanship. However, he is fundamentally misaligned with the seniority of this Executive CTO role. He lacks the required experience in scaling engineering organizations, managing board-level communications, and architecting production-grade, multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes fintech environments, making him unsuitable for this position.
